overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in red armor exploring a dimly lit interior room with red emergency lighting. The character walks through the space examining furniture and a glass display case containing an armored mannequin.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters with display case and living area

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the room toward the back wall, passing by furniture and equipment

entered.detail: tall transparent display case containing a mannequin wearing futuristic armor
metal table with equipment and items on the surface
white metal shelving unit against the back wall with storage boxes
posters and notices pinned to the left wall
green upholstered couch against the right wall
small kitchenette area with sink and counter

segments.scene_description: The character begins exploring a dimly lit industrial room with red emergency lighting. A glass display case with an armored mannequin stands to the right, while a metal workbench occupies the left side. The character walks forward toward the back of the room where shelving and a couch are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters with display case and living area

events.description: character reaches the back wall and turns around to walk back toward the entrance area
character slows down and approaches the glass display case for closer inspection

agents.ego_description: turning around at the back wall and walking back toward the display case, examining the room from a different angle

segments.scene_description: The character turns around at the back of the room and walks back toward the display case. The metal shelving and wall posters are left behind as the camera focuses on the armored mannequin in the glass case, which moves from the right side to the center of the frame as the character approaches for a closer look.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial room that shifts from a general exploration of the space to a focused examination of a specific artifact. It begins with the character in red armor walking forward under red emergency lighting, passing a metal workbench on the left and a glass display case on the right. As the character reaches the back of the room, the camera glides past shelving and a couch before turning around to retrace its steps. The scene then shifts focus away from the wall posters and shelving as the character walks back toward the center of the room. Finally, the camera closes in on the armored mannequin within the glass case, bringing the figure from the periphery into the center of the frame for a detailed look.
